def solve(grid, x, y, k)
  submatrix_rows = grid[x..x + k - 1].map { |row| row[y...y + k] }
  reversed_submatrix = submatrix_rows.reverse
  (x..x + k - 1).each do |i|
    original_row = grid[i]
    new_row = reversed_submatrix[i - x]
    part1 = original_row[0...y]
    part2 = new_row
    part3 = original_row[y + k ...]
    grid[i] = part1 + part2 + part3
  end
  grid
end
